title: Magically Charred Thai Collards Pad Thai
description: A kid-friendly Thai dish featuring charred collards and gooey lardons, this pad thai is a unique twist on a classic recipe. It is kosher-friendly and made with accessible ingredients.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lardons to the pan and cook until crispy, then set aside.
Add the chopped collard greens to the pan and cook until charred, stirring frequently.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tamarind paste, fish sauce, and brown sugar.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan with the collard greens and pour in the tamarind sauce.
Stir everything together, then add the cooked lardons and chopped peanuts on top.
Season with salt to taste, then serve hot.
